mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO visit_log (visit_date, visitor_key, ip, user_agent) VALUES (#{visitDate}, #{visitorKey}, #{ip}, #{userAgent})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visit_log WHERE visit_date = #{visitDate}
SELECT visit_date AS visitDate, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM visit_log WHERE visit_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY visit_date ORDER BY visit_date ASC
